mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.prompt_id, l.created_at, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.bookmark_count, p.like_count FROM likes l LEFT JOIN prompts p ON p.id = l.prompt_id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId}::uuid ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE user_id = #{userId}::uuid AND prompt_id = #{promptId}::uuid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (id, user_id, prompt_id) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), #{userId}::uuid, #{promptId}::uuid) ON CONFLICT (user_id, prompt_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM likes WHERE user_id = #{userId}::uuid AND prompt_id = #{promptId}::uuid
